metadata.methodology: Classic 18-hole rounds are used for standard scoring records. Career averages and rates require at least 8 classic rounds. Hole-level records use the 2,856 hole-score rows supplied. Short-course and alternate-drive rounds are excluded from standard 18-hole leaderboards.

records.title: Most Net Championships
records.description: Based on the official Place field in the championship round.

records.title: Most Championship Top-3 Finishes
records.description: Tied finishes count as the listed finishing position.

records.title: Gross Course Records
records.description: Lowest classic-round gross score at every course.

rows.name: Payne's Valley
rows.context: Danny Peterson, Dominic Denby, Jared Powell

records.title: Net Course Records
records.description: Lowest classic-round net score at every course.

records.title: Highest Course Scoring Average
records.description: Average gross score across all BGW classic rounds at each course.

records.title: Toughest Individual Holes
records.description: Highest average gross score relative to par.

records.title: Easiest Individual Holes
records.description: Lowest average gross score relative to par.

records.title: Highest Birdie Rate by Hole
records.description: Gross birdies divided by rounds played on that hole.

records.title: Highest Double-Bogey-or-Worse Rate
records.description: Gross scores of double bogey or worse divided by rounds.

records.title: Best Singles Match Record
records.description: Ranked by points percentage; ties count as one-half point. Minimum 3 matches.

records.title: Best Team Best-Ball Record
records.description: Each partner receives the match result. Minimum 3 matches.

records.title: Best Overall Match Record
records.description: Singles and best-ball combined. Minimum 3 matches.

records.title: Most Overall Match Wins
records.description: Singles and best-ball wins combined.
